name: deploy
context: Deploy a smart contract to an EVM chain via x402 payment protocol
info: Full deployment pipeline: takes Solidity source, compiles with solc, generates ABI, constructs deployment transaction, optionally negotiates x402 payment for gas/service fees, broadcasts to target chain, and returns deployed address + ABI. Supports CREATE2 for deterministic addresses. Works with Base, Mainnet, Optimism, Arbitrum, and any EVM chain.

scripts.name: Compile Solidity
scripts.description: Compile Solidity source to bytecode + ABI

scripts.name: Deploy Contract
scripts.description: Deploy compiled contract to target EVM chain

scripts.name: Deploy with CREATE2
scripts.description: Deploy to deterministic address using CREATE2

scripts.name: Verify on Explorer
scripts.description: Verify deployed contract source on block explorer

contract_name.description: Name of the contract to deploy

value.description: ETH value to send with deployment
